detail_raw_text:
回上一頁	國立金門大學	 
 	教學綱要	 

部別 : 日間部研究所碩士班	114學年度第2學期	列印日期 : 2026/05/24
科目名稱 : 台閩建築史 (Criticisms on Southeast Asian Architecture)	開課班級 : 建築碩一	學　　分 : 3.0	授課時數 : 3.0
授課教師 : 黃信穎	必選修 : 選修	 	 


1.教學目標
The course plans to examine the history of East or Southeast Asian architecture in a new perspective. The historical writings and studying on architecture have long been overwhelmed by the ideology of Euro-American, Continental, heroism, and of tepid latitudes/ the north. Equally and consequently the conception applies to the design of buildings in the south, so echoes the class, gender, racist and geographical prejudices. It is argued in this course that only critically re-read the buildings and the history can the building in the East Asia be re-wrote/de-signed. The second objective of this course is that this is an entry level of research training for the 3-year students, who are going to begin their final year project and prepare for the postgraduate programme. In a form of seminar, debates and critical thinking are encouraged and practised during class. Students' semester grade are marked 50% depending on the discussion during the class and 50% on the final presentation. 


2.教學綱要
本課程為暑期前往雅加達進行建築普查之準備課程；下學期「東南亞建築史學」課程則為建築普查之成果發表與檢核。

The course begins with an introduction on research methods in the week one and two. It is followed by the case-study on colonial verandah architecture, the sino-neoclassicism, the regionalism, modernist housing, and finally a conclusion about authenticity, historicity and architectural design. Each subject takes two weeks. Focuses of these cases are set on floor plans, constructions, structure, building materials, methods of buildings, ornaments and decorations, rituals and ceremonies, ways of life, ideologies, and design trends. The rest of the weeks in this spring semester is allowed for the students to present and discuss their works.
